New Jersey Uniform Crime Report

Five years of index crime data (2020–2024) reported by law enforcement agencies across all 21 counties. Search any town, compare communities, and track trends over time.

Source: New Jersey State Police • Uniform Crime Reporting Program • Jan.–Dec. each year
